description:
About Fusion

We are a global specialty Managing General Agent (MGA) headquartered in Sydney CBD, partnering with leading insurers to deliver tailored underwriting solutions across international markets. We operate in a highly professional, corporate environment, with a lean Sydney team supporting a globally distributed executive leadership group.

The Opportunity

Due to growth, we are seeking a Business Analyst to join our Sydney team and support the continued development of our systems, processes, and data capabilities.

Reporting to the Head of IT & Projects, and working closely with key stakeholders across the business, you will play a hands-on role in supporting project delivery and continuous improvement initiatives. You will gain exposure across the full project lifecycle, from initial requirements through to testing and implementation, while working with underwriting, finance, operations, and technology teams.

This is an excellent opportunity for an early career Business Analyst who is looking to build strong foundations across business analysis, technology, and insurance operations, within a growing, global organisation.  

Key Responsibilities

Assist with requirements gathering through stakeholder engagement 

Support the creation of functional specifications and documentation 

Participate in solution design discussions with internal teams and vendors 

Perform testing and QA activities to ensure system outputs meet requirements 

Contribute to process mapping and process improvement initiatives 

Support reporting and data validation across systems 

Work collaboratively across underwriting, finance, and operational teams 

Assist with operations, project coordination and delivery activities 

Support staff with general IT queries and troubleshooting

About you

You will bring:

1 – 3 years’ experience in a Business Analyst role or similar  

Degree in Business / Commerce / IT or relevant field

Understanding of business analysis principles and requirements documentation

Exposure to the project lifecycle (Agile or Waterfall)

Experience with AI tools and emerging technologies

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with high attention to detail

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Experience with data, reporting, or systems (Excel, Power BI, CRM/PAS)

Experience in, or exposure to insurance services is advantageous, but not essential

Basic understanding of accounting principles or ERP applications is desirable

You’ll be curious and keen to learn, comfortable working across technical and commercial topics, and eager to build a long-term career in insurance, technology, or consulting.

Why join us?

Develop your skills within a growing, global insurance organisation

Versatile role providing exposure to all areas of the business

Small, collaborative team with the opportunity to learn from industry-leading professionals

Sydney CBD office location, close to public transport

Interested? We'd love to hear from you! Apply now via the link.
